items.html: Understand this — what is the matter of the clothing of the soul, which is made of that Ruach [spirit] that he casts into her. It, too, is from the Hesed, in the secret of Eloha, except that it is from the RIU [216]. And perhaps this is why Eloha is MB [42], which is likewise Gevura. See the Zohar, Mishpatim.
